title: PE applications
summary: Aggregate import for the Case–Khaitan–Lin–Tyrrell–Yuan finite-part identity and its Pfaffian specialization.

mathematicalContent.heading: Application layer
mathematicalContent.body: The two imported modules assemble abstract evaluation, recursion, divergence, and renormalization interfaces into a finite-part curvature-integral statement, then specialize that framework to a Pfaffian-like invariant.

mathematicalContent.heading: What this file proves
mathematicalContent.body: Applications.lean itself is only an import hub and declares no result. The theorem hypotheses and the exact formal identities are documented in CaseKhaitanLinTyrrellYuan.lean and PfaffianApplication.lean.

references.note: Source of the two application themes represented by the imported modules.

limitations: This is an import-only aggregate. It neither states nor proves the application theorems; readers must inspect the two child modules and their interface assumptions.
